login.title: Nbanye nke onye òtù ọlụlụ
login.subtitle: Nweta dashboard onye mmekọ gị
login.legalPrefix: Site na ịpị gaa n'ihu, ị kwenyere na anyị na-aga n'ihu.

register.title: Mepụta akaụntụ
register.subtitle: Tinye nkọwa gị iji malite.
register.legalPrefix: Site na ịpị gaa n'ihu, ị kwenyere na anyị na-aga n'ihu.
register.successMessage: Daalụ maka ịdebanye aha. Iji rụọ ọrụ akaụntụ gị, biko lelee email gị wee pịa njikọ nkwenye anyị zitere gị.
register.passwordTooShort: Paswọọdụ ga-enwerịrị ma ọ dịkarịa ala mkpụrụedemede 6.

twoFactor.title: Nyocha Abụọ
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Tinye koodu ọnụọgụ 6 site na ngwa nyocha gị
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Tinye otu n'ime koodu mgbake gị iji banye.
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Biko tinye koodu mgbake dị irè (usoro: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: Inwe nsogbu? Kpọtụrụ nkwado maka enyemaka.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Koodu na-ezighi ezi. Biko nwaa ọzọ.

setup.subtitle: Ka anyị kwadebe gị. Biko họrọ ụdị akaụntụ gị iji gaa n'ihu.
setup.clinicDescription: M na-anọchite anya ụlọ ọgwụ ma ọ bụ ụlọ ọrụ ahụike na ọtụtụ ndị dọkịta
setup.labDescription: M na-anọchite anya ụlọ nyocha ma ọ bụ ụlọ nyocha
setup.individualDescription: Abụ m onye na-ahụ maka ahụike ma ọ bụ onye na-eme nchọpụta.

messages.errorFallback: Ọdịda izipu email nrụgharịa. Biko nwaa ọzọ.

success.title: Lelee email gị
success.sentTo: Anyị zigara njikọ nrụpụta paswọọdụ na {{email}}
success.description: Biko lelee igbe mbata gị ma soro ntuziaka iji tọgharịa paswọọdụ gị. Njikọ ahụ ga-agwụ n'ime 1 awa.

form.title: Echefuru paswọọdụ gị?
form.description: Tinye email gị ma anyị ga-ezitere gị njikọ nrụpụta.

validation.uppercase: Ọ dịkarịa ala otu akwụkwọ ozi dị elu.
validation.lowercase: Ọ dịkarịa ala otu akwụkwọ ozi dị ala.
validation.special: Ọ dịkarịa ala otu agwa pụrụ iche.

messages.requirementsMissing: Biko mezuo ihe niile achọrọ paswọọdụ
messages.errorFallback: Ọdịda n'inweghachi okwumgbo. Njikọ ahụ nwere ike agwụla.

messages.invalidLink: Njikọ nkwenye na-ezighi ezi. Biko jiri njikọ ahụ site na email gị.
messages.successFallback: A kwadoro email gị nke ọma.
messages.errorFallback: Enweghị ike ịkwado email ahụ. Njikọ ahụ nwere ike agwụla.

state.loadingDescription: Biko chere ka anyị nyochaa adreesị ozi-e gị.
state.successDescription: A na-enyocha email gị nke ọma.
state.errorDescription: Anyị enweghị ike ikwenye adreesị ozi-e gị.

success.nextStep: Ugbu a, ị nwere ike ịbanye na akaụntụ gị site na iji email gị na paswọọdụ gị.

error.helpText: Ọ bụrụ na nke a na-aga n'ihu, kpọtụrụ nkwado ma ọ bụ debanye aha ọzọ.
